ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer was acquired */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact information entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the contact information belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact information */,
  "preferred_contact" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the customer's preferred contact method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contact information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the interaction belongs to */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_medium" TEXT /* Medium used for the interaction */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "next_follow_up" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the city belongs to */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* City code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)
